description: Expected findings for anti-IL-1 monoclonal antibodies and IL-1 receptor antagonists (canakinumab, anakinra, rilonacept). IL-1 is a proximal inflammatory cytokine; blockade produces marked anti-inflammatory effects. Cynomolgus monkey and rat are relevant species. Inherits Fc-mediated base findings from general_mab.

expected_findings.rationale: IL-1-beta drives hepatic acute phase response independently of IL-6. Suppression is expected PD endpoint.
IL-1 supports granulopoiesis; blockade may mildly reduce neutrophils.
